description: Registry for executable business migrations. sql/customer.ownership.md remains the customer ownership document; the customer baseline is now covered by executable SQL migration and validation files.

entries.rollbackPlan: For an unreleased development database, restore from backup or drop the customer-owned tables created by this baseline in reverse dependency order, then rerun the previous accepted baseline. Production/released data requires a separate executable rollback plan before use.
verification: mysql < sql/migrations/V20260625_001_customer_schema.sql when a disposable MySQL test database is available

entries.rollbackPlan: For an unreleased development database, remove only the two built-in PUBLIC customer seed rows PUB_DIRECT_SALE and PUB_SELF_MEDIA after verifying no dependent business data exists. Production/released data requires a separate executable rollback plan before use.
verification: mysql < sql/migrations/V20260625_002_customer_seed_public_customer.sql when a disposable MySQL test database is available
mysql < sql/validation/customer_runtime_validation.sql when a disposable MySQL test database is available

entries.rollbackPlan: For an unreleased development database, delete only sys_menu rows with permission prefix business:customer:* and the customer menu row business:customer:list; remove the root business menu only if it has no remaining children. Production/released data requires a separate executable rollback plan before use.
verification: mysql < sql/migrations/V20260625_003_customer_menu_permission.sql when a disposable MySQL test database is available

entries.rollbackPlan: Validation SQL is read-only and has no data rollback. If validation finds rows, use a separate approved cleanup or migration change before claiming runtime acceptance.
verification: mysql < sql/validation/customer_runtime_validation.sql when a disposable MySQL test database is available

entries.rollbackPlan: For an unreleased development database, drop idempotent_request only after confirming no in-flight PROCESSING records are needed. Production/released data requires a separate executable rollback plan before use.
verification: C:\Users\11131\.cache\codex-tools\apache-maven-3.9.9\bin\mvn.cmd -pl ruoyi-business -am -Pintegration-test verify when Docker/MySQL Testcontainers are available
mysql < sql/migrations/V20260625_004_idempotent_request.sql when a disposable MySQL test database is available
